creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: My changes for upstream Makefile which made install target usable on FreeBSD were accepted (https://github.com/notsecure/uTox/commit/c2317a5afe59a25d875c97a1473ddf78980afca4), so do-install: may finally be dropped. Also @cwd is the plist is not needed. Apart from that, it's ready to be committed.
